message:
fix(freeze): add closure reverse sync and native shape cache coherence

Two correctness fixes for the frozen interpreter:

1. Closure variable reverse sync in relooper codegen: After function calls,
   closures may have written to captured parent locals through var_refs.
   The relooper was missing the reverse sync (_locals_jsv → locals) that
   the full codegen already had, causing stale local values and wrong
   type-checking paths (e.g., TS2345 crash). Added targeted sync that
   only copies the specific captured local indices, guarded by a runtime
   _closure_alive flag to avoid syncing before any closure exists.

2. Native shape cache write-through for flags: nativeGetFlags() reads from
   a cached NativeAstNode.flags, but put_field "flags" wrote only to the
   JS object via setPropertyStr, leaving the cache stale. This broke
   declare namespace auto-export: setExportContextFlag set ExportContext
   (flag 128) on the JS object, but declareModuleMember read the stale
   cached value without it, routing all namespace members to locals instead
   of exports. Added nativeSetFlags() that updates both the native cache
   and JS object, and wired put_field "flags" codegen to use it.

Fixes: declare namespace member resolution, Intl type errors in lib.es5.d.ts
